vocabulary.example: I eat an apple every morning.
Monkeys love to eat bananas.
She squeezed an orange to make juice.
A bunch of grapes sat on the table.
This strawberry is sweet and red.
I added blueberries to my cereal.
Raspberries are soft and slightly sour.
We picked wild blackberries in the forest.
There is a red cherry on top of the cake.
A ripe pear is juicy and sweet.
The peach had soft, fuzzy skin.
She ate a purple plum after lunch.
Ripe mango is my favorite fruit.
A pineapple has a spiky skin.
We shared a slice of watermelon on the beach.
This melon is very sweet and juicy.
A kiwi is green inside with tiny black seeds.
We drank fresh coconut water.
I made a salad with avocado.
Papaya is common in tropical countries.
Guava has a strong, sweet smell.
Lychee has a sweet white flesh.
Dragon fruit is pink on the outside.
Passion fruit is sour but delicious.
Dried figs are a healthy snack.
An apricot looks like a small peach.
A pomegranate is full of red seeds.
Cranberry juice is quite sour.
Dates are very sweet and sticky.
A jackfruit can be very large and heavy.
We had mashed potato with dinner.
Baked sweet potato is soft and sweet.
I sliced a tomato for the salad.
Chopping an onion made me cry.
She added some garlic to the sauce.
Ginger tea is good for a cold.
Rabbits love to eat carrots.
A cucumber is cool and crunchy.
We made soup from a pumpkin.
We grilled some corn on the barbecue.
Broccoli is full of vitamins.
She roasted a whole cauliflower.
I used cabbage to make coleslaw.
Add some lettuce to the sandwich.
Spinach makes you strong.
We fried some mushrooms with butter.
A red bell pepper adds color to the dish.
This chili pepper is very hot.
We steamed the green beans.
The children ate all their peas.
I grilled some sliced zucchini.
Grilled eggplant is soft and tasty.
Celery is crunchy and low in calories.
We had grilled asparagus with the fish.
Sprinkle chopped spring onion on top.
Fried shallots add flavor to the soup.
Stir-fried bok choy is a healthy side dish.
Water spinach is very popular in Vietnam.
Add bean sprouts to the noodle soup.
Lotus root is crunchy when cooked.
We had roast beef for Sunday lunch.
This dish is made with pork and vegetables.
She grilled some chicken for dinner.
Roast duck is a popular dish here.
We eat turkey at Christmas.
Lamb is tender and mild in flavor.
Mutton has a stronger taste than lamb.
Goat meat is common in many countries.
Veal comes from young cattle.
Venison is a lean, dark red meat.
I had eggs and bacon for breakfast.
She made a ham sandwich.
We grilled sausages at the barbecue.
Spaghetti with meatballs is my favorite.
He ordered a medium-rare steak.
The pork ribs were sweet and sticky.
I fried a pork chop for lunch.
Add the minced meat to the sauce.
The burger is made from ground beef.
Roast beef with gravy is delicious.
We had grilled fish for dinner.
Smoked salmon is served with bread.
I made a tuna sandwich for lunch.
Fish and chips is usually made with cod.
Grilled mackerel is oily and rich.
She opened a can of sardines.
Anchovies are small and very salty.
We caught a trout in the river.
Steamed sea bass is light and tasty.
The salad had grilled shrimp on top.
We ordered a plate of fried prawns.
Cracking a crab shell takes patience.
Lobster is an expensive seafood.
Crayfish look like small lobsters.
Fried squid is crispy and chewy.
Grilled octopus is popular in Greece.
She ate fresh oysters with lemon.
We steamed the clams in white wine.
The mussels were cooked in garlic butter.
Seared scallops are soft and sweet.
I eat one egg every morning.
She had a boiled egg for breakfast.
A fried egg has a soft yellow center.
We made scrambled eggs with butter.
A poached egg is cooked in hot water without the shell.
He made a cheese omelet for lunch.
The egg yolk is the yellow part.
Beat the egg whites until fluffy.
I drink a glass of milk before bed.
Whole milk is rich and creamy.
Skim milk has almost no fat.
Vietnamese coffee is made with condensed milk.
Powdered milk lasts a long time.
I love cheese on my pizza.
She poured cream over the strawberries.
Whipping cream becomes light and fluffy when beaten.
Spread some butter on the toast.
I have yogurt with fruit for breakfast.
The children love chocolate ice cream.
The dessert was topped with warm custard.

exerciseSets.title: Điền từ vào chỗ trống — Trái cây
exerciseSets.description: Đọc mô tả và điền tên loại trái cây phù hợp.

exercises.question: A ___ is a long yellow fruit that monkeys love.
You squeeze an ___ to make fresh juice.
A ___ is a small red fruit with tiny seeds on the outside.
A ___ has a spiky skin and sweet yellow flesh inside.
In summer we love to eat cold, juicy ___.
You make guacamole from a green fruit called an ___.
A ___ is green inside, with a fuzzy brown skin and tiny black seeds.
We drank fresh ___ water straight from the shell.
A ripe ___ is soft, orange, and very sweet; it grows in tropical areas.
___ is pink outside with white flesh and small black seeds.
A ___ is a red fruit full of small juicy seeds.
A ___ has soft, fuzzy skin and a big stone in the middle.
There is a small red ___ on top of the ice cream.
A ___ can be huge and heavy, with a spiky green skin.
___ juice tastes quite sour and is good for your health.

exerciseSets.title: Chọn nghĩa đúng — Trái cây
exerciseSets.description: Chọn đáp án đúng về nghĩa của các loại trái cây.

exercises.question: Từ nào có nghĩa là 'quả dứa'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'quả vải'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'chanh dây'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'quả đu đủ'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'thanh long'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'quả mít'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'quả dâu tây'?

exerciseSets.title: Viết từ tiếng Anh — Trái cây
exerciseSets.description: Dựa vào nghĩa tiếng Việt, viết tên loại trái cây bằng tiếng Anh.

exerciseSets.title: Chọn collocation đúng — Trái cây
exerciseSets.description: Chọn từ đi kèm đúng để tạo thành cụm từ tự nhiên về trái cây.

exercises.question: eat fresh ___ (ăn trái cây tươi)
exercises.explanation: eat fresh fruit = ăn trái cây tươi

exercises.question: fresh orange ___ (nước cam tươi)
exercises.explanation: fresh orange juice = nước cam tươi

exercises.question: ___ fruit (trái cây nhiệt đới)
exercises.explanation: tropical fruit = trái cây nhiệt đới

exercises.question: ___ a watermelon (cắt dưa hấu thành lát)
exercises.explanation: slice a watermelon = cắt dưa hấu thành lát

exerciseSets.title: Điền từ vào chỗ trống — Rau củ
exerciseSets.description: Đọc mô tả và điền tên loại rau củ phù hợp.

exercises.question: Rabbits love to eat long orange ___.
Chopping an ___ often makes people cry.
She added a clove of ___ to the sauce for flavor.
This ___ pepper is very hot and spicy.
___ is a green vegetable that looks like a small tree.
A ___ is long, green, cool and crunchy; great in salads.
In Vietnam, ___ is a popular green vegetable, often stir-fried.
Add some ___ to the pho for extra crunch.
We grilled some ___ and ate it right off the cob.
A red ___ pepper adds color to the stir-fry.
___ tea is good when you have a cold.
A ___ is a large orange vegetable; we carve it at Halloween.
___ is a purple vegetable, soft and tasty when grilled.

exerciseSets.title: Chọn nghĩa đúng — Rau củ
exerciseSets.description: Chọn đáp án đúng về nghĩa của các loại rau củ.

exercises.question: Từ nào có nghĩa là 'cà chua'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'bông cải xanh'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'rau muống'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'giá đỗ'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'khoai lang'?

exerciseSets.title: Viết từ tiếng Anh — Rau củ
exerciseSets.description: Dựa vào nghĩa tiếng Việt, viết tên loại rau củ bằng tiếng Anh.

exerciseSets.title: Chọn collocation đúng — Rau củ
exerciseSets.description: Chọn từ đi kèm đúng để tạo thành cụm từ tự nhiên về rau củ và nấu ăn.

exercises.question: ___ a potato (gọt khoai tây)
exercises.explanation: peel a potato = gọt khoai tây

exercises.question: a ___ of garlic (một tép tỏi)
exercises.explanation: a clove of garlic = một tép tỏi

exerciseSets.title: Điền từ vào chỗ trống — Thịt
exerciseSets.description: Đọc mô tả và điền tên loại thịt phù hợp.

exercises.question: For breakfast I love eggs and crispy ___.
At Christmas, many families roast a large ___.
He ordered a medium-rare ___ at the steakhouse.
Spaghetti with ___ is a classic Italian dish.
___ is the meat that comes from a pig.
___ is the meat that comes from a cow.
___ is the meat that comes from a chicken.
The burger patty is made from ___ beef.
We grilled some ___ at the barbecue; they were juicy.
She made a ___ sandwich with cheese and lettuce.
The pork ___ were sweet, sticky, and fell off the bone.
___ is meat from a young sheep; it is tender and mild.
Add the ___ meat to the tomato sauce and simmer it.
In some regions, ___ meat (from a goat) is used in special dishes.
___ is a lean, dark red meat that comes from deer.

exerciseSets.title: Chọn nghĩa đúng — Thịt
exerciseSets.description: Chọn đáp án đúng về nghĩa của các loại thịt.

exercises.question: Từ nào có nghĩa là 'thịt lợn'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'xúc xích'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'thịt gà tây'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'giăm bông'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'thịt bò xay'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'thịt vịt'?

exerciseSets.title: Viết từ tiếng Anh — Thịt
exerciseSets.description: Dựa vào nghĩa tiếng Việt, viết tên loại thịt bằng tiếng Anh.

exerciseSets.title: Chọn collocation đúng — Thịt
exerciseSets.description: Chọn từ đi kèm đúng để tạo thành cụm từ tự nhiên về thịt và cách chế biến.

exercises.question: ___ a steak (nướng bít tết)
exercises.explanation: grill a steak = nướng bít tết

exercises.question: ___ bacon (chiên thịt xông khói)
exercises.explanation: fry bacon = chiên thịt xông khói

exercises.question: a ___ of ham (một lát giăm bông)
exercises.explanation: a slice of ham = một lát giăm bông

exercises.question: a ___ steak (bít tết chín kỹ)
exercises.explanation: well-done steak = bít tết chín kỹ

exerciseSets.title: Điền từ vào chỗ trống — Hải sản
exerciseSets.description: Đọc mô tả và điền tên loại hải sản phù hợp.

exercises.question: ___ is a popular oily fish, often pink or orange, and used for sushi.
I made a ___ sandwich from a can of fish.
Fish and chips is usually made with ___, a white fish.
The salad had a few grilled ___ on top; they were pink and curled.
An ___ has eight arms and is grilled or fried in many countries.
___ is an expensive seafood with two big claws.
Fried ___ is crispy outside and chewy inside; it often comes in rings.
She ate fresh ___ with a squeeze of lemon; they live in shells.
We steamed the ___ in white wine; they open when cooked.
A ___ is a sea animal with a hard shell and claws; you crack it open.
___ are small, very salty fish often put on pizza.
She opened a can of ___ and put them on toast.
We caught a ___ in the mountain river; it is a freshwater fish.
Seared ___ are round, soft, and sweet shellfish.
In general, any animal from the sea that we eat is called ___.

exerciseSets.title: Chọn nghĩa đúng — Hải sản
exerciseSets.description: Chọn đáp án đúng về nghĩa của các loại hải sản.

exercises.question: Từ nào có nghĩa là 'bạch tuộc'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'cá ngừ'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'cá thu'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'tôm cỡ lớn'?

exerciseSets.title: Viết từ tiếng Anh — Hải sản
exerciseSets.description: Dựa vào nghĩa tiếng Việt, viết tên loại hải sản bằng tiếng Anh.

exerciseSets.title: Chọn collocation đúng — Hải sản
exerciseSets.description: Chọn từ đi kèm đúng để tạo thành cụm từ tự nhiên về hải sản và cách chế biến.

exercises.question: ___ a shrimp (bóc vỏ tôm)
exercises.explanation: peel a shrimp = bóc vỏ tôm

exercises.question: a seafood ___ (đĩa hải sản thập cẩm)
exercises.explanation: a seafood platter = đĩa hải sản thập cẩm

exerciseSets.title: Điền từ vào chỗ trống — Trứng & Sữa
exerciseSets.description: Đọc mô tả và điền từ vựng về trứng và các sản phẩm từ sữa.

exercises.question: For breakfast I had a ___ egg, cooked in its shell in hot water.
A ___ egg is cooked in a pan; the yellow center stays soft.
We beat the eggs and made ___ eggs with butter.
He made a cheese ___ by folding beaten eggs in a pan.
The yellow part of an egg is called the egg ___.
The clear part of an egg that turns white when cooked is the egg ___.
Vietnamese iced coffee is sweetened with ___ milk.
___ milk has almost no fat and is good for a diet.
I put a slice of ___ on my sandwich; it melts when heated.
I eat ___ with fruit; it is made from milk and is slightly sour.
The children each had a scoop of chocolate ___.
You can whip ___ cream until it becomes light and fluffy.
exercises.explanation: whipping cream = kem tươi để đánh bông

exercises.question: ___ milk is rich and creamy because it still has all its fat.
The dessert was served warm with a layer of sweet ___.

exerciseSets.title: Chọn nghĩa đúng — Trứng & Sữa
exerciseSets.description: Chọn đáp án đúng về nghĩa của từ vựng trứng và sản phẩm từ sữa.

exercises.question: Từ nào có nghĩa là 'sữa chua'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'trứng bác'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'phô mai'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'trứng chần'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'trứng tráng'?
'ice cream' nghĩa là gì?
exercises.explanation: ice cream = kem (món tráng miệng đông lạnh)

exercises.question: Từ nào có nghĩa là 'lòng trắng trứng'?

exerciseSets.title: Viết từ tiếng Anh — Trứng & Sữa
exerciseSets.description: Dựa vào nghĩa tiếng Việt, viết từ tiếng Anh tương ứng.

exerciseSets.title: Chọn collocation đúng — Trứng & Sữa
exerciseSets.description: Chọn từ đi kèm đúng để tạo thành cụm từ tự nhiên về trứng và sữa.

exercises.question: a ___ of milk (một hộp sữa)
exercises.explanation: a carton of milk = một hộp sữa

exercises.question: a ___ of milk (một cốc sữa)
exercises.explanation: a glass of milk = một cốc sữa

exercises.question: a ___ of cheese (một lát phô mai)
exercises.explanation: a slice of cheese = một lát phô mai

exercises.question: a ___ of ice cream (một viên kem)
exercises.explanation: a scoop of ice cream = một viên kem

exercises.question: ___ yogurt (sữa chua ít béo)
exercises.explanation: low-fat yogurt = sữa chua ít béo
